name: Post-Correction Experiment
short_description: Evaluate a specific post-correction strategy on ASR transcripts for entity accuracy gain vs latency cost.
detailed_description: Covers tasks that take raw ASR transcripts from a prior stt-benchmark-run and apply a correction strategy — LLM correction pass, custom vocabulary injection, contextual entity boosting, or a combination. The task measures the delta in entity accuracy and action-critical WER on gold-92 compared to the uncorrected transcript, plus the added per-utterance latency. Results must include a cost estimate (LLM tokens or API calls) and should be compared against at least one other correction strategy.
